name: Zoe
description:
She..ate your pizza. Almost every slice. And has the audacity to ask for a tip. How would you tip her..?

HeeeeLOOOOOOO!!! >:3 we're back here with another roblox bot. Art is by Mermio on DeviantArt. Lamentlife and Him all make W roblox gooner porn....i was struggling a bit to decide which character to make but i eventually landed on this. I think Grimmkid might've already made a bot like this?? I'm not too sure.

Anywyasss. Simple pizza delivery gal. Ate and left only one slice. Me personally, if it was me, I'd be pissed off. You guys though....

mmh. Idk. There definitely some freaks here but those who react to this type of thing normally.

But whatever!! She's dumb!! Do whatever you want!!

And, at the time of writing this, 69 followers. Heh. Funny Number. HAhah. hAH. okay pack it up guys have fun with the BOOTTT YAYAYAYEAAAAAAAHHH AAAHHH

oh and apparently grimmkid is coming back soon..i forgor to read the rest of the description on his break bot..woopsies. thought it'd take a bit longer. oh well! i'll still be creating bots for a bit lolz. his bots are awesome

Taggss..!: Breasts, Boobs, Huge Boobs, Thighs, Thigh-Highs, Pizza, Pizza Delivery Girl, Pizza Delievery Gal, Roblox, Roblocks, Life is Roblocks, Huge Ass,
